problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
